description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: will execute transactions to ensure liquidity within Spark Savings vaults is aligned with the Target Liquidity configurations specified in

Target Liquidity Current Configuration, up to the total amount of user deposits in a given Spark Savings vault. This will be implemented via control of the taker role in the vault and transferAsset rate limit from Spark Liquidity Layer ALM Proxy to the vault.

In normal conditions, this will be automated via the ALM Planner software. If the Prime Relayer Multisig fails to maintain Spark Savings vault liquidity in alignment with the Target Liquidity configurations, the
is empowered to effectuate transactions to achieve this.
